name: block
description: Anchored data-display actor. A $block bridges woo to an outside-world data source: an external plug authenticates as the block's actor (apikey-bound) and pushes property values through tier-gated write verbs; the block's owner sets configuration through the same verbs. Permissions follow the LambdaMOO :is_*_by convention — overrideable per-class verbs that gate every state mutation.

classes.description: Base class for plug-driven data display. Anchored: a block stays at its placement and rejects becoming a container. Property writes go through :set_property[ies], which gate on this:is_writable_by_property(actor, name) — the LambdaMOO-shaped per-class hook. Default property policy grants wizard bypass, grants self-write of names in writable_self (so an apikey-bound plug session writes its own data props), and grants owner-write of names in writable_owner (so the block's owner sets config without touching the plug surface). Subclasses override the verb for richer policy; the writable_owner / writable_self lists are the conventional default-impl data.

verbs.name: is_writable_by
verbs.source: verb :is_writable_by(who) rxd { if ("the_perm":controls(who, this)) { return true; } if (who == this) { return true; } return false; }

verbs.name: is_writable_by_property
verbs.source: verb :is_writable_by_property(who, name) rxd { if (has_flag(who, "wizard")) { return true; } if (who == this && name in this.writable_self) { return true; } if (who == this.owner && name in this.writable_owner) { return true; } return false; }

verbs.name: set_property
verbs.source: verb :set_property(name, value) rx { if (typeof(name) != "string" || !name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_property requires a non-empty name", value: name }; } if (!this:is_writable_by_property(actor, name)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "property is not writable by this actor", value: { property: name, actor: actor } }; } this.(name) = value; let here = location(this); if (here != null && isa(here, $space)) { observe_to_space(here, { type: "block_data", block: this, name: name, value: value, ts: now() }); } return value; }

verbs.name: set_properties
verbs.source: verb :set_properties(values) rx { if (typeof(values) != "map") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_properties requires a map", value: values }; } let names = keys(values); for n in names { if (!this:is_writable_by_property(actor, n)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "property is not writable by this actor", value: { property: n, actor: actor } }; } } let audience = location(this); let routable = audience != null && isa(audience, $space); let ts = now(); for n in names { let v = values[n]; this.(n) = v; if (routable) { observe_to_space(audience, { type: "block_data", block: this, name: n, value: v, ts: ts }); } } return values; }

verbs.name: get_data
verbs.source: verb :get_data(name) rxd { if (typeof(name) != "string" || !name) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "get_data requires a non-empty name", value: name }; } if (!this:is_readable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot read this block", value: this }; } return this.(name); }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let view = this:look_self(); let text = ""; if (typeof(view) == "map" && has(view, "description")) { text = to_string(view["description"]); } else { text = to_string(view); } observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: location(this), target: this, text: text, look: view, ts: now() }); return view; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let summary = {}; for n in this.summary_props { summary[n] = this.(n); } return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, last_pushed_at: this.last_pushed_at, last_error: this.last_error, summary: summary, location: location(this) }; }

verbs.name: moveto
verbs.source: verb :moveto(target) rx { if (!has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "this block is anchored and cannot be moved", value: this }; } return moveto(this, target); }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { if (has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { return true; } return false; }

verbs.name: list_apikeys
verbs.source: verb :list_apikeys() rxd { let all = $system:list_api_keys_for_owner(); let mine = []; for k in all { if (k["actor"] == this) { mine = mine + [k]; } } return mine; }
